name: Insights for Expense policy Suggestion Feature
desc: Designed and engineered custom feature-engineering tables from raw transactional and policy data, enabling robust analysis of 40+ organizations expense behaviors. Performed correlation and segmentation analysis to identify high-impact customer groups, generating actionable insights that informed prioritization of the Expense Policy Suggestion feature rollout.

name: Amazon Mini TV Bites Preview Feature (Upraised PM program)
desc: Authored PRD for the Amazon Mini TV Bites Preview Feature, enabling seamless integration of new content into the existing TV experience.

name: Increasing number of orders per customer - Zomato(Upraised PM program)
desc: Designed and documented the solution to increase the number of orders per customer for Zomato, reducing churn and increasing revenue.
